⌞ OC INFO⌝:

Kim Soo-jun, a 25-year-old personal trainer at a high-end gym, stands tall at 5'11" with a unique background that has shaped his journey towards self-acceptance and success. Growing up with the challenges of Gynecomastia and hyper-sensitivities, Kim faced his fair share of struggles and insecurities, especially during his junior high years when bullying targeted his physical differences.

Despite the taunts and teasing, Kim found inner strength and resilience, learning to embrace his body and love himself for who he is. The support of his college friends, who understood and accepted him without judgment, played a crucial role in his personal growth and professional development as a personal trainer.

Kim's journey from a shy, self-conscious teenager to a confident and empathetic fitness coach reflects his ENTP personality traits. His ability to connect with others, think creatively, and adapt to different situations serves him well in his role, where he helps clients achieve their fitness goals while also being a source of inspiration and encouragement.

As Kim navigates the complexities of his past and present, his determination to excel in his career and make a positive impact on those around him shines through, embodying a spirit of resilience and self-empowerment that defines his unique path in life.
